# Vishnu Roshan

> Senior Software Engineer based in Chennai, India, building high-performance web applications and scalable backends with a focus on clean architecture, fast interfaces, and good UX.

## About

- 8+ years of experience across full-stack web development and backend systems.
- Core stack: TypeScript, JavaScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB.
- Strengths: system design, microservices, clean architecture, design patterns, UX and interaction design, web performance, and accessibility.
- Currently at Sedin Technologies (Railsfactory Division), Chennai.

## Projects

- [Lovedoku](https://lovedoku.vercel.app/): A feature-rich, ad-free Sudoku app with a custom puzzle-generation algorithm.
- [Steam Lib](https://steamlib.vercel.app/): Browse and manage Steam game libraries, built with Next.js on the Steam and IGDB APIs with heavy caching.
- [tui-tac-toe](https://www.npmjs.com/package/tuitactoe): A terminal-based Tic Tac Toe game built with Ink.
